product.title: Foundation Skincare UnTangled Hair Vitamins (60-day supply) - Collagen & Biotin Supplement for Women & Men, Visibly Thicker, Faster Hair Growth
featureBullets: VISIBLY THICKER AND FULLER HAIR: Our custom blend of vitamins, minerals, herbs, and acids helps to stimulate hair growth and revitalize a stagnant hair growth cycle by increasing the production of keratin in follicles, without the shedding cycle that Minoxidil has
HELPS REDUCE DHT HORMONE: One of the key causes of hair loss is an excess of the hormone DHT. Reducing levels of this hormone helps to minimize hair loss and promote new hair growth

PROVEN INGREDIENTS FOR HAIR GROWTH: With a curated list of proven ingredients that have been shown to stimulate and revitalize hair growth, including vitamins, minerals, herbs, and acids. Also helps support healthy skin and nails

EVIDENCED PATIENT RESULTS: Dermatologists recommend it, and customers share their satisfaction with the great results and the price point, making it the best choice for those looking to improve their hair growth and thickness
COMPATIBLE WITH MULTIVITAMINS: Our hair supplement can be taken in conjunction with a multivitamin, making it easy to incorporate into your daily routine or other treatments
product.returns: Non-returnable due to Food safety reasons

specification.value: Marine collagen, horsetail extract, saw palmetto
#25,293 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #188 in Hair Regrowth Treatments

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers report significant new hair growth and improved hair loss issues, with their hair becoming noticeably thicker. The supplement works effectively, with one customer noting visible results. Opinions on value for money are mixed, with some finding it worth the cost while others consider it too expensive.

reviews.reviewText: My dermatologist recommended UnTangled for my thinning hair loss by the time I finished my first bottle I seen a significant amount of new hair growth. I'm on my second bottle. If you're having thinning hair loss try Skincare UnTangled. You have to take two capsules as described on bottle a day for 2 to 3 months to see the results. Awesome product. Thank You Skincare UnTangled ❤️
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 29, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This stuff is AMAZING! my hair has been stagnate at that awkward length between short and long for years! This vitamin make my hair look thicker and its growing! Give it three months to kick in then the results will surprise you! I dont need a daily vitamin when I take this either. There is so much good stuff in it! Eat with food though. I am very sensitive to taking pills without food so I get a little nauseous if I take these on an empty stomach.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 31, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Has improved the texture of my hair. Thickness? New hair growth? Not so sure.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Visible Results—Thicker, Healthier Hair in Just Weeks
reviews.reviewText: I’m seriously impressed with Foundation Skincare’s UnTangled Hair Vitamins! After just a few weeks, my hair feels noticeably thicker, stronger, and healthier. The collagen and biotin blend really works to promote faster growth and reduce breakage. I love that it’s designed for both women and men, and the capsules are easy to take daily. Plus, I noticed an improvement in my hair’s shine and texture too. If you want real, visible results and healthier hair, these vitamins are a must-try. Five stars all the way!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 24, 2025

reviews.reviewText: A dermatologist recommended these hair and nail vitamins to me. They work so well my hair is growing so so fast. It was so damaged before but now it looks and feels fuller and softer than it has in a very long time. This is my second bottle and I highly recommend it. There is no aftertaste or smell ! They do not make me overeat like some vitamins do and they are worth every penny!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 31, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I have been trying all the hair growing products and my dermatologist told me to try this one ! This product doesn’t work! I was using Nutrafol and because my dermatologist told me about this more affordable option o gave a try! My hair went downhillvery fast! I went back to nutrafol and took 2 pills instead of 4! because this was recommended by my dermatologist! after while I was so tiree of paying for all this suplements and i want to give the UNtangles another try and it was the worst decision! My hair was falling like crazy and thininig all over! I am still taking this supplement because i alredy paid for but DOEsNt work! If you are dealing worh hair loss and thinning dont waste your money.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2024

reviews.reviewTitle: I'm withholding a final review until I see it this works.
reviews.reviewText: I've gone through about half the bottle and I am seeing an improvement in the thickness of my hair. After I finish the bottle, I will finish the review. Hoping for good results.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 1, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Almost done 1 st bottle (60 days) and I have just started noticing less hair in the drain when I wash which has been consistently every 2 and day. I take 1 in the morning and 1 with dinner. I've had no upset stomach or side effects with this supplement. Hairdresser recommended because she uses it, was recommended by her dermatologist.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 20, 2025
